# Saving KC Homebuyers

> We buy houses for cash in the Kansas City metro area. No repairs, no agents, no fees. Close in as few as 7 days.

## Company

- Name: Saving KC Homebuyers
- Owner: Ernest Dodson
- Phone: (816) 429-2900
- Email: info@savingkc.com
- Address: 1712 Main St, Kansas City, MO 64108
- Website: https://savingkc.com
- Founded: 2020
- Google Rating: 4.9 stars

## What We Do

Saving KC Homebuyers is a cash home buying company serving the Kansas City metropolitan area across Missouri and Kansas. We purchase single-family homes, duplexes, triplexes, and small multi-family properties in any condition. Homeowners sell to us when the traditional listing process doesn't work — they need to sell fast, can't afford repairs, are dealing with inherited property, tax liens, foreclosure, divorce, or other distressed situations.

Our process:
1. Contact us (call or online form)
2. We visit and make a written cash offer within 24 hours
3. You choose the closing date (7 to 60 days)
4. Sign at a local title company and receive funds same day

We pay all closing costs. No agent commissions. No fees. The offer amount is what you receive.

## Service Area

5 counties across 2 states:

### Missouri
- Jackson County (Kansas City, Independence, Blue Springs, Lee's Summit, Grandview, Raytown, Grain Valley, Oak Grove, Sugar Creek)
- Clay County (Liberty, Gladstone, Kearney, Excelsior Springs, Smithville, North Kansas City, Claycomo, Holt, Lawson, Missouri City)
- Platte County (Platte City, Parkville, Riverside, Weatherby Lake, Weston, Camden Point)

### Kansas
- Wyandotte County (Kansas City KS, Bonner Springs, Edwardsville, Lake Quivira)
- Johnson County (Overland Park, Olathe, Shawnee, Lenexa, Merriam)

## Situations We Handle

- Foundation Issues
- Fire Damage
- Water Damage
- Mold
- Hoarder House
- Inherited Property / Probate
- Divorce
- Behind on Mortgage Payments
- Pre-Foreclosure
- Vacant Property
- Bad Tenants
- Code Violations
- Tax-Delinquent Properties
